name: Feature request

### What are you trying to do?

<!-- Describe the use case first, not the solution. "I want X so that
Y" is easier to reason about than "add button Z." -->

### Proposed solution

<!-- Optional. If you have a specific implementation in mind, sketch it.
Otherwise leave this blank and we can figure it out together. -->

### Alternatives you've considered

<!-- What else might solve the same problem? -->

### Scope check

Is this something that only applies to fanless Macs (the Air), or to
fan'd Macs (Pro/Studio/etc.) too? Air Assist is Air-first; non-Air
features live on a separate roadmap and may not land soon.

- [ ] Air-first feature
- [ ] Non-Air feature
- [ ] Applies to all Apple Silicon Macs
